subcodes.first_line: O thou conscious servant of God, on this blessed Day my hope is that thou mayest attain unto that which is worthy and befitting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آگاه الهی درین یوم مبارک امیدم چنانست که بانچه شایان و سزاوار است
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @empty learning; false spirituality, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
